items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for 'Attendee itinerary generation and reminders', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or validations related to this functionality. The linked use case specifies the need for attendee itinerary generation and reminders, yet there are no prior steps that demonstrate this functionality being implemented or tested. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
